nasb.text: Let them make haste and take up a wailing for us, That our eyes may shed tears And our eyelids flow with water.

esv.text: let them make haste and raise a wailing over us, that our eyes may run down with tears and our eyelids flow with water.

cnv.text: 叫他們趕快為我們舉哀， 使我們的眼流下眼淚， 使我們的眼皮湧出淚水。

ccb.text: 叫她们速来为我的子民哀哭， 哭得他们泪盈满眶， 哭得他们泪如泉涌。
